title: lithospermum lineatum
intro: Lithospermum lineatum, also known as Blue Cespitose Gromwell, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. Lithospermum lineatum is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or ointment for its herbal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
